case_title: HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOC. VS MCDONALD, ELIZABETH, ESQ.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,241.59 FILED BY HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOC. AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD, ELIZABETH, ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-26-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-13-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL. COMM. ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF FROM THE CASE. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDONALD, ELIZABETH, ESQ. $2,241.59 PRINCIPAL, $59.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,301.09 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD, ELIZABETH, ESQ.
